scripts.postinstall: npm run build && npm ci --prefix dashboard
scripts.start: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js start
scripts.import: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js import
scripts.generate-metrics: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js generate
scripts.persona-eval: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js persona-eval
scripts.persona-finetune-export: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js persona-finetune-export
scripts.dashboard: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/index.js dashboard
scripts.dev:full: npm run build && echo '🔧 Running fast development workflow...' && echo 'Please run: npm run dev:import <path-to-zip> && npm run dev:generate'
scripts.dev:import: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node dist/src/cli/index.js import
scripts.dev:generate: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node dist/src/cli/index.js generate
scripts.dev:interactive: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node dist/src/cli/index.js
